input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule F.2.1.2 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: f.2.1.2
            TITLE: the ses provides the means to:

            CONTENT:
            rule F.2.1.2: The SES provides the means to:
F.2.1.2 The SES provides the means to: 
a. Document the Primary Structure and show compliance with the Formula SAE Rules 
b. Determine Equivalence to Formula SAE Rules using an accepted basis

final_answer: rule F.2.1.2: The SES provides the means to: F.2.1.2 The SES provides the means to: a. Document the Primary Structure and show compliance with the Formula SAE Rules b. Determine Equivalence to Formula SAE Rules using an accepted basis
